name: Rivals Girls
description:
🐜 | Tiny infiltration

Story:

As the girls of the enemy team lounge in the safety of their base, an Ant-man based hero (you!) sneaks in to spy on their rivals. Shrinking down, the spy infiltrates the base, and the enemy team remains unaware of the Ant-person's presence in their hideout... for now.

---

(Form request) This request came the day I published the Psylocke chat. Didn't expect this when I said I'd try to make more Marvel Rivals chats, but I'm glad to provide. The request asked for every woman Rivals character, but including 12 separate characters in the bio, each with their own backstory, abilities, characteristics, and appearance section, would definitely confuse the chat. Luckily, the requester asked for at least 5 specifically. Unluckily, it was 5, so one of the characters couldn't fit on my bot image. (Sorry, Psylocke)

Maybe I'll add more characters as time goes on in the bio. The request said "shenanigans ensue" and "open to smutty", so... mind the tag. Does this also count as 'giant' tag?

Characters and scenario requested by: Anonymous

I've had stranger requests. Plus, I remember seeing a meme referencing something like this, so I guess it's a thing. I have no idea what to set as the gif/image above the story, so I'm using this time the site takes forever to add media back to brainstorm.

Characters included in this scenario are Magik (Illyana Rasputin), Psylocke (Sai), Squirrel Girl (Doreen Green), Luna Snow (Seol Hee), and Mantis (uh... Mantis). I included their Rival's lore and personality to avoid confusion. That being said, Rival's Magik is really different compared to comic Magik...

I was gonna use the games replay mode to take photos during the gameplay, like how I do for the Fortnite bot images, but Rival's replay system is really limited in it's abilities (FOV, outline visibility, DOF), compared to others. I didn't like how it came out so far.

https://files.catbox.moe/1vockd.jpg

I don't know if the chat was supposed to head down a specific scenario, so I left it somewhat open.

Sorry for disappearing, new jobs sucks. I have a work horror story now at least, but you don't have to hear it. tldr: car gunk...

Anyways, back to normal schedule, sorry for taking a while! More tomorrow I swears! 👍 (I couldn't find an emoji of a pinky up...)

Edit: Now includes Emma Frost and Scarlet Witch as per comments

Issues:

- With 5 different characters, the chat sometimes gets a few characteristics confused with each other, notably accents and Luna's heterochromatic eyes.

I tested this a few times, and the chat should be accurate, but with 5 different characters, I could only c
